<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk003.pdf#page=3 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p104 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISIN -->


[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img002.jpg|thumb|Putten mit Triangel und Querflöte D. . . . . . . . . I I . . . .]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img005.jpg|thumb|S<sub>2</sub> Putten mit Trompete und Pauke S. Putten mit Stah und Notanhand]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk003_p003_img007.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p105 -->
